title: The Perfect Ring | #shorts
full_text: So, you're really going to propose, huh, Brij? It's good. It's good. Your sister may never get there. I don't know why Ganesh punishes me like this. But I'm happy you found your person. But please don't make a mistake. Don't mess it up the way your dad messed up our reception dance. >> I got the ring, Mom. I'm ready. >> Okay, but is it a real ring or something digital nonsense you bought in the metaverse? You know, your father got me a ring so stunning. I actually said yes before he even asked. The right ring has that effect. I don't know anything about that. Did you know that in Botswana natural diamonds are funding healthcare and education? That's the kind of story her parents are going to love. You're not just giving a ring, you're giving a backstory. The story behind the story is the main story. A natural diamond takes billions of years to produce. Like, it took me 20 years to produce a perfect sun. >> Mom, can you stop being so dramatic? I bought her the perfect ring. She's going to love it. >> Mom, where are you going? I have to take a photo of it and I have to change my WhatsApp status to mother-in-law. >> I haven't even asked yet. >> Yes, but I've seen the ring. This is a yes.
